title: tragacantha diopogon
intro: Tragacantha diopogon, also known as the milk thistle, is a biennial or perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its seeds, which contain silymarin, a flavonoid complex that has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of tragacantha diopogon include protection against liver damage, reduction of inflammation, and improvement of digestion. Traditionally, the seeds are used to make herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and teas, which are used to support liver health and overall well-being.
